title: Dusk & Divinity
description: This Mod Was Based On Charter, A Mod From Content SMP, Run By A Youtuber Named Doctor4t
body:
This Mod Was Based On Charter, A Mod From Content SMP, Run By A Youtuber Named Doctor4t


There are many things in minecraft, like beasts, dragons, undead, and chicken jockeys, but you know what there isn’t?



Yep, This Mod has to do with divine intervention. But From Who, God, Allah, or Buddha?
No, This Mod Allows YOU to be a god, by allowing you to craft insanely overpowered weapons with Divinity Ingots, which are crafted using Tin.



Tin, Which can be found Underground in the form of ore, like most things in Minecraft, is solely used for looking cool, and making Divinity Ingots, a Bronze-like metal that can be used in many crafting recipes in the mod, as well as being able to be blast-smelted to purify it and allow for even more powerful crafts.



The Dusk’s Epitaph: If You’ve heard of Content SMP, you probably know this weapon, a large, claymore-like sword that can ban opponents with one foul blow. Sadly, Because this is a forge mod, I don't have access or skill enough to make the cool particle effects, so instead of banning players, the weapons are both insanely overpowered, and have their own unique abilities, the Dusk’s Epitaph only having the ability to be strong. If you right click you can freeze enemies in place and the enemy if hit will die instantly, and if you kill another player, they get set back to the world spawn.
The Ignipotence Of The Umber Eye: A stronger version of the Dusk’s Epitaph, possessing fire abilities, setting enemies on fire permanently until they are dead. The right click ability is the same for The Ignipotence Of The Umber Eye, but it will set them on fire instead , but will still prevent them from moving, and if you kill a player, it also erases their inventory, so don't do this as a prank on a extremely geared friend!
The Umber Eye: A large eye with a brown retina that can, when right clicked, set all nearby enemies on fire permanently until death. Used in crafting recipe for The Ignipotence Of The Umber Eye.
Lesser Divinity: Again, If You Know of Content SMP, you know this weapon, capable of banning enemies again, but can do it only three times before shattering.
Now, In this mod, it instead launches you upwards toward the heavens, and gives you some insane buffs when you fall upon your enemies, good for getting out of a pickle, but it can only do it three times, and also has a super long cooldown inbetween uses.
Shattered Lesser Divinity: The Lesser divinity, now shattered, that instead of launching you, will teleport you randomly,and deal an AOE explosion where you land; it only has one use.
Divinity Coin: a coin made of divinity ingots, that when flipped/right clicked, either gives you a buff, or a debuff in the form of absorption or wither.
Pure Divinity Coin: the divinity coin, purified, now having an unequal good/bad ratio for coin flips, and having stronger good buffs.
Numinous Falcata: A Sword of divine origin, and allows you to force-choke mobs when you hit them, essentially.
Ender Macuahuitl: an ancient race of prehistoric enderman made a bat-like weapon that teleports enemies randomly on impact.
Achelois Katar: a bloody dagger, mounted upon a pair of Netherite knuckles, that gives a little health each time you attack.
Bane Chakram: a discus weapon that has little use when used in melee, but when thrown deals poison damage and is more powerful when striking enemies.



Armor is added in this mod which allows you to be protected from every mob in the game reliably except maybe the Warden, and there are two armor sets.
The Divine Armor set, which is crafted from Divinity Ingots, and has a few special abilities, including protecting you from all debuffs except for damaging ones, like poison or wither. It has a huge amount of durability with enchantments, and is now the second best armor in the game.
Pure Divinity Armor is the new strongest armor, and can be crafted by, you guessed it, Purified Divinity Ingots, and it protects you from all debuffs whatsoever, and allows you to fly if under half health, just dont wear the full set in Creative, you won’t be able to fly. If you are at one heart it will give you an insane amount of regeneration, healing you from the brink of death. It only works if you are at one health or below, so if you get hit with an attack that deals more damage than the amount you have while above 1 heart, you'll still die.




I Strongly Recommend using JEI and Better Combat with this mod, it improves the experience and accessibility.
